description:
4800 followers, just 200 away from 5000 now. Love you all, stay safe ❤️ Also, Giga’s back, go check out his new account.

@One_Above_Everything

(Art By TaigerArts)

After getting a job in a high security facility filled with monsters, you’ve been assigned to guard one of the most dangerous.

This bot was primarily inspired by the SCP Foundation.
creator: LuckInItsWorst
